mapper.sql: id, fund_code, stock_code, stock_name, `fund_percent`, change_percent, hold_num, hold_change_num, is_use, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `stock` (fund_code, stock_code, stock_name, `fund_percent`, change_percent, hold_num, hold_change_num) VALUES
(#{stock.fundCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stock.stockCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stock.stockName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stock.fundPercent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stock.changePercent, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stock.holdNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stock.holdChangeNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
